name: Chief Superintendent (Rtd.) Sadongo
title: Chief Executive Officer, Pempen Consult | Advisory Board Member
bio: Currently serves as CEO of Pempen Consult, advising public and private sector institutions. Brings independence of thought, discretion, ethical leadership, and strategic clarity to the advisory board. Provides guidance in governance, asset safeguarding, risk management, and stakeholder confidence.

name: Dr. Jacob Plange-Rhule
title: Advisory Board Member
credentials: D.Statis, Adv.Dip, Grad.Cert, ACCPA, CIHRM, PMQ, MIoD, MISDS, CIAMC, ChPA, FCILG, MA, MBA, MSC, Ph.D
bio: Entrepreneur and transformational leader with 20+ years in executive leadership across telecommunications, energy, logistics, hospitality, real estate, and construction. Held senior roles including HR Director, COO, and regional managers. Academic/Level 4 Project Work Supervisor for professional certification programs; adjunct lecturer at University of Gold Coast; examiner for CIHRM Ghana.

name: Ronald Andrews Abbey
title: Advisory Board Member | Director of Finance, University Gold Coast
bio: Distinguished finance executive providing strategic leadership over financial governance and long-term growth. Associate Member of Institute of Financial Accountants (UK) and Institute of Public Accountants (Australia); advancing toward full qualification with Institute of Chartered Accountants, Ghana.

name: Dr. John Kwesi Quarm Junior
title: Advisory Board Member | Managing Director, Quarm Associates Ltd
bio: Civil and Structural Engineer with nearly two decades of experience delivering complex infrastructure and building projects across Ghana. Led design, supervision, and delivery of residential, institutional, commercial, and faith-based developments. Supervised landmark projects at University of Cape Coast for over a decade.

name: Amara Okonkwo
title: Lead Property Agent - Lagos
bio: Award-winning luxury real estate specialist with 12+ years experience in Nigeria's premium property market. Amara has successfully closed over $50M in high-end residential transactions and maintains an extensive network of international investors and local developers.

name: Sarah Kipchoge
title: Senior Agent - Nairobi
bio: Passionate about connecting clients with their dream properties across East Africa. Sarah specializes in waterfront estates and golf course communities, with deep knowledge of Nairobi's most exclusive neighborhoods and emerging luxury developments.

name: Kwame Asante
title: Marketing Director
bio: Creative marketing strategist with expertise in luxury brand positioning and digital campaigns. Kwame leads Umanie Homes' marketing initiatives across Africa, leveraging cutting-edge technology and data analytics to reach high-net-worth individuals globally.

name: Fatima Diop
title: Investment Consultant
bio: Financial strategist specializing in real estate investment portfolios for diaspora and international clients. Fatima provides comprehensive analysis on ROI, market trends, and long-term growth opportunities across African luxury markets.

name: Michael van der Merwe
title: Senior Agent - Cape Town
bio: Luxury property specialist with deep expertise in Cape Town's Atlantic Seaboard and Winelands estates. Michael brings 15 years of experience in high-value transactions and has established relationships with international buyers seeking South African luxury properties.

name: Zainab Mustapha
title: Client Relations Manager
bio: Dedicated to ensuring exceptional client experiences throughout the property buying journey. Zainab coordinates seamless transactions, manages client communications, and ensures every detail exceeds expectations. Her multilingual capabilities and cultural awareness make international clients feel at home.
